name: Northern Star Resources Ltd
analysis: NST has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$21.3000, stop A$17.3745, target A$24.8000 (0.89:1) — then trail it.
